name: Greek Chicken Pitas with Garlic Cucumber Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 skinned and boned chicken breast halves
2 6 inch pita bread rounds cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken breast halves evenly with Greek seasoning.
2. Cook the chicken in oil in a skillet over medium-high heat, turning once, for 10-15 minutes or until browned.
3. Drain on paper towels. Slice the chicken.
4. Serve the chicken slices in pita pockets with Garlic-Cucumber Sauce, shredded lettuce, and sliced tomato.
